reviews.comment: I would highly recommend Frederick Window Tinting to anyone in the area looking to get their windows tinted.  They were very professional and kind, with excellent communication from Sharyn, and they also got my car done hours before they initially said it would be done, which is a huge plus.  I live in New Jersey, and visit the Frederick area frequently, and I waited until I was near Frederick again to get my windows tinted so I could go here, that is how bad I wanted to get my windows done here after reading all of the positive things people had to say about Frederick Window Tinting.  Very reasonable pricing, especially considering the quality of the tint and how well it was put on my car.  Would definitely recommend Frederick Window Tinting!!!

reviewReply.comment: Thanks for the 5 stars! 🌟 We’re so happy to have earned your trust and look forward to helping you again whenever you need us. Enjoy the tint!

reviews.comment: I can’t say enough great things about Frederick Window Tinting. As soon as I’m ready for a window tint, I can call and Sharyn has us in ASAP. The team there is ALWAYS kind and in a great mood. I’m always given the best options and of the 6 or so cars done there, I’ve NEVER had a single issue. I send anyone and everyone I know to Frederick Window Tinting. They are one of my favorite businesses in all of Frederick County. You will NOT be disappointed!

reviews.comment: Incredibly happy with them. Extremely professional and do quality work. I texted Sharyn at 11:30AM and immediately got an answer. They were able to fit me in the same day, and by 3PM my car was finished. They even upgraded me from S-7 film to the S-9 for FREE because I had to wait a short period of time while dropping my car off. Highly recommend to anyone looking to get their windows tinted. I know I will be back to get my other vehicle tinted from here!! Thank you all for the wonderful job!

reviews.comment:
I made an appointment for my wife's car while she was away on a trip to get the front windows tinted to match the back. Sharyn sent a Google calendar invite for my appointment (and updated as necessary), which is something I typically do anyway but that was already a great start. Danny did a great job on her car so I mentioned that I'd like to get mine done eventually and she said she could fit me in that day. So I brought back my car to get the front windows and windshield done and chatted it up with Sharyn and Danny while the work was being done. They are super down-to-earth people and it was a pleasure getting to know them and doing business with them.

This is the only tinting place I've experienced in Frederick but I would highly suggest putting them on your list to contact for all your tinting needs. They were very informative, answered every question I had, and do excellent work using high quality methods and materials.

Thank you Sharyn and Danny!! Hope to visit again soon!

reviewReply.comment: Thank you for the 5-star rating! ⭐️ Your support means so much to our family business. If you ever need anything or have friends looking for quality window tinting, we’re here to help!

reviews.comment:
It’s been a while since I got my truck windows tinted at Frederic Window Tinting.  A couple reasons why.  First and foremost, procrastination is real!  lol  Secondly, I was waiting after a month or so to see how the tint job held up and absolutely no issues at all!!

I had all windows completed.  All back windows are at 5%, front sides are 35%, windshield strip at 5% and the whole windshield with a 70%.

The professional work that was completed was top notch!  From assisting with choosing what kind of tint, answering all questions, front desk operations, and care of my truck…this place was definitely a win!  I’d definitely recommend getting your windows tinted at this place!

reviewReply.comment: WOW! Thank you for a stellar review! We appreciate you!
